name: workshop
description: Josh's personal monorepo for apps, scripts, and experiments.

scripts.deploy:ota: pnpm --filter workshop-app exec npx eas-cli@latest update --auto --branch production
scripts.deploy:ios: pnpm --filter workshop-app exec npx eas-cli@18.8.1 build --platform ios --profile production --auto-submit --non-interactive --no-wait
scripts.deploy:ios:local: pnpm --filter workshop-app exec npx eas-cli@18.8.1 build --platform ios --profile production --local --auto-submit --non-interactive
scripts.deploy: pnpm run deploy:backend && pnpm run deploy:ota && pnpm run deploy:ios
